# MONTIO APP - Production Build

This branch contains the built/compiled version of the MONTIO application.

## Structure:
- `/` - Frontend static files (React build)
- `/api/` - Backend Node.js application
- `.htaccess` - Apache routing configuration

## Automatic Deployment:
This branch is automatically updated by GitHub Actions when code is pushed to the `main` branch.

**DO NOT EDIT FILES IN THIS BRANCH MANUALLY!**

All changes should be made in the `main` branch.
